# contentful_webhook (Resource)





<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String)
- `space_id` (String)
- `url` (String)

### Optional

- `active` (Boolean)
- `filters` (List of String)
- `headers` (Attributes List) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--headers))
- `http_basic_password` (String)
- `http_basic_username` (String)
- `topics` (List of String)
- `transformation` (Attributes) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--transformation))

### Read-Only

- `webhook_id` (String)

<a id="nestedatt--headers"></a>
### Nested Schema for `headers`

Required:

- `key` (String)
- `value` (String)

Optional:

- `secret` (Boolean)


<a id="nestedatt--transformation"></a>
### Nested Schema for `transformation`

Optional:

- `body` (String)
- `content_type` (String)
- `include_content_length` (Boolean)
- `method` (String)
